## Question

Please ask your question clearly and concisely.

## Context

Provide any relevant context that might help answer the question:
- What are you trying to accomplish?
- What have you already tried?
- What documentation have you consulted?

## Category

- [ ] Methodology or theoretical framework
- [ ] Code implementation
- [ ] Results interpretation
- [ ] Usage or installation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Information

Add any other information that might be relevant.
